## Home Page

### Hero

Doula & Parent Coach

From Overwhelmed to Confident

Holistic support for pregnancy, birth and parenting. Clarity, calm and confidence at every stage.

### Experience

- 13 years — Experience as a certified birth doula, supporting families across Byron Bay and Berlin.

- 100+ births — Attended as a doula, bringing calm, knowledge, and personalised care to every birth.

Support makes all the difference for mothers and their partners. With 13 years of experience supporting births across Byron Bay and Berlin, and a deeply personalised approach to every family.

- Certified Birth Doula CBI (Childbirth International)
- Aware Parenting Coach
- Based in Byron Bay, Australia, supporting worldwide

Feel informed, confident, and ready for birth.

Includes:
- Personalised birth plan
- Labour comfort and breathing techniques
- Partner preparation
- Personalised postpartum plan

Pricing: Virtual $295 · In-Person $495

#### Parent Coaching

Less power struggles. Better sleep. More connection.

Includes:
- 60-minute Zoom session
- Written session summary
- Personalised support plan
- One week of follow-up support via email or voice note

Pricing: Virtual Session $275

## About Page

### About Nathalie

"Know your options. Trust your instincts. Birth with confidence."

Certified birth doula and parent coach with 13 years of experience supporting families in Byron Bay and worldwide.

### My Story — How I Came to This Work

My path into birth work began with my own journey into motherhood.

As a mother of three, I know that an empowered birth is rarely the result of chance. It is cultivated through deep preparation, informed decision-making, and being surrounded by people who honour and support your unique vision for birth.

Through my own experiences, I came to understand birth and parenthood not simply as life events, but as profound rites of passage — transformative experiences that shape us long after the day our babies are born. I believe that if we truly honoured this transition into motherhood with the reverence, support, and preparation it deserves, our culture around birth would look very different.

Born in Lübeck and raised between Germany, Guatemala, and Spain, I was shaped by life across continents before eventually making my home between Australia and Europe. Today, I divide my time between Byron Bay and Berlin. Living within different cultures has given me a deep appreciation for the many ways families welcome babies, care for mothers, and honour the journey into parenthood.

This global perspective, combined with my professional training and lived experience as a mother, informs the way I support families today — with warmth, evidence-based education, deep respect for individual choices, and a belief that every woman deserves to approach birth feeling informed, confident, and connected to her own inner wisdom.

### Training & Credentials

- Cultural Anthropologist (M.A.)
- Certified Birth Doula CBI (Childbirth International)
- Certified Doula (Dr. Michel Odent)
- Certified End Of Life / Death Doula (Thoughtful Transitions)
- Trained in the Spinning Babies approach to childbirth
- Certified Aware Parenting Coach
- Trained in the Possums & Co evidence-based approach to sleep, breastfeeding & unsettled babies
- Certified Yoga Teacher (BYV)
- Pregnancy & Birth Specialist / Parent Coach at Cleo

### Selected Interviews

- "Mothering The Mother" — Mumma Milla · M. Magazine
  https://mumma-milla.com/blogs/news/byron-bay-birth-doula

## Birth Preparation Page

https://thebyrondoula.com/birth-preparation.html

Feel informed, confident, and ready.

A personalised 2.5 hour session giving you and your partner the knowledge and tools to approach birth with calm and clarity.

### Your birth, your way

Whether you're planning a water birth at home, or a scheduled caesarean, this session is built around your specific circumstances. Drawing on 13 years of experience supporting families in the birth room, I'll help you prepare for the best possible experience, whatever that looks like for you.

### What's Included

- 2.5 hour session
- Personalised birth plan
- Labour comfort and breathing techniques
- Medical & non-medical pain relief options
- Partner preparation
- Optimise birth outcomes & minimise interventions
- Postpartum Plan
- Available in-home in Byron Bay or virtually worldwide

Pricing: Virtual $295 · In-Person $495

### Client Reviews — Birth Preparation

"Nathalie gave support throughout the whole pregnancy, birth and postpartum period. She was calm and professional yet kind and warm and really helped support my partner so he could support me. As a GP I will be highly recommending Nathalie."
— Dr Camilla White, GP and Mother of Three

"Nathalie was a constant support with the most beautiful nature. We adored her manner, communication and we found all of her teachings highly informative and clear. We felt supported all the way."
— Lucy Folk, Mother

"I was visualising an intimate, drug-free water birth and my wish became a reality with the help of Nathalie. This was the best investment and I can highly recommend having this beautiful woman by your side."
— Cisco Tschurtschenthaler, Mother

"The overwhelming calming confidence you gave my wife was what I liked best about your support. That helped release any fear and allowed her to relax and allow her and her body to do what it was meant to do. Watching my wife trust her body and give birth with such grace gave me an overwhelming admiration for her. Your calm confidence and knowledge allowed her to do that. So I thank you for that."
— George Gorrow, Father

"Nat has the most divine way of making you feel safe, informed, connected and fully in control. She is a wealth of knowledge, experience and intuition."
— Amy Sinclair, Mother of Two

"With you in my corner, I didn't feel fearful at all. I felt confident, well balanced and full of trust in my body."
— Thea V., Mother

---

## Parent Coaching Page

https://thebyrondoula.com/parent-coaching.html

From reactive to calm and confident.

Tantrums, sleep struggles, power struggles. Parenting is hard. I help you understand what's really driving your child's behaviour and give you practical tools to handle it.

"It's always a pleasure to speak with Nathalie. She is so knowledgeable and has an innate ability to deliver advice in the most gentle, supportive and kind way. I feel very blessed to have her as my coach."
— Mum of a 3-year-old

### Client Reviews — Parent Coaching

"Nathalie always makes me feel so heard and supported. She has such a beautiful manner and always offers support in a truly non-judgmental way. I can't thank her enough."
— Mum of a 2-year-old

"Nathalie helped affirm that my gut was right, and her reassurance around my baby's sleep reduced my overall stress."
— Mum of a 5-month-old

"Thanks for all your support. You're a blessing. All the advice is so helpful, practical and reassuring."
— Mum of a 6-week-old baby

### Support that fits your family

Grounded in Aware Parenting, our 1:1 session is a non-judgmental space where you get support tailored to your family, not generic advice.

You'll leave feeling:
- Calm instead of triggered
- Confident instead of second-guessing
- Less anxious about sleep and daily challenges
- More connected to your child

### What's Included

- 60-minute Zoom session
- Personalised action plan with clear next steps
- Practical strategies including simple tools for behaviour and sleep challenges
- 1 week of follow-up support (email, text, voice note)

Pricing: Virtual Session $275 AUD

---

## About The Byron Doula

The Byron Doula is run by Nathalie Solis Pérez, a certified birth doula and parent coach based in Byron Bay, Australia. With 13 years of experience, Nathalie has supported 100+ births and holds qualifications in birth doula practice, Aware Parenting coaching, cultural anthropology, and yoga teaching. She is featured in Grace Tales, iamibu, The Rara Files, Cleo, Dear Work, and Space to Flow. Aggregate rating: 5.0 stars from 46+ reviews.

Last updated: June 2026
